data.body:
CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓

FIXES APPLIED:

**Fix 1** (plugins/dso/scripts/test-batched.sh, lines ~329-346):
Replaced O(N) python3 subprocess-per-entry interrupted-check with a single python3 call that parses the entire state file and emits results + completed IDs in one pass. Eliminates 258 python3 spawns with 258 completed entries (~15.9s overhead eliminated).

**Fix 2** (plugins/dso/scripts/runners/bash-runner.sh, lines ~118-126):  
Hoisted _abs_test_dir computation outside the per-file loop. Previously computed via subshell /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra-worktrees/worktree-20260406-104322 on every iteration = O(N) subshells. Now computed once before the loop. Eliminates half of path normalization overhead (~3s reduction with 260 files).

BEFORE: 258-completed resume took 17.6s overhead + tests. Exit 144 with --timeout=50.
AFTER: 258-completed resume takes 4-8s total. Exit 0.

**New failing test added** (tests/scripts/test-test-batched.sh):
test_state_loading_overhead_is_sublinear: creates 200 completed + 1 remaining, verifies full run completes in <10s. Was failing (took 10+s) before fix, passes (3s) after.
